raw: {"perspective": "Legal Advisor", "findings": [{"severity": "BLOCK", "file_or_area": "GDPR Article 22 consent flow", "issue": "Insufficient or non-existent consent flow for automated decision-making", "recommended_fix": "Implement explicit consent flow for automated decision-making as per GDPR Article 22"}, {"severity": "WARN", "file_or_area": "AZ Personal Data Protection Act", "issue": "Potential non-compliance for Baku launch", "recommended_fix": "Review and ensure compliance with AZ Personal Data Protection Act for Baku launch"}, {"severity": "BLOCK", "file_or_area": "Platform liability", "issue": "Insufficient consent flow for automated decision-making under GDPR Article 22", "recommended_fix": "Implement explicit consent flow for automated decision-making as per GDPR Article 22 to mitigate platform liability"}, {"severity": "WARN", "file_or_area": "Data processor agreements", "issue": "DPAs may not be in place for Supabase, Google Cloud, Railway", "recommended_fix": "Verify and ensure DPAs are in place for all data processors"}, {"severity": "WARN", "file_or_area": "Terms of Service", "issue": "Current ToS may not cover AI-generated assessments", "recommended_fix": "Review and update ToS to cover AI-generated assessments"}], "overall_verdict": "WARN", "whistleblower_flag": null, "next_files_to_read": ["supabase/migrations/", "apps/api/app/routers/assessment.py", "docs/ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md"]}

findings.issue: Insufficient or non-existent consent flow for automated decision-making
findings.recommended_fix: Implement explicit consent flow for automated decision-making as per GDPR Article 22
Review and ensure compliance with AZ Personal Data Protection Act for Baku launch

findings.issue: Insufficient consent flow for automated decision-making under GDPR Article 22
findings.recommended_fix: Implement explicit consent flow for automated decision-making as per GDPR Article 22 to mitigate platform liability

findings.issue: DPAs may not be in place for Supabase, Google Cloud, Railway
findings.recommended_fix: Verify and ensure DPAs are in place for all data processors

findings.issue: Current ToS may not cover AI-generated assessments
